productName: Rosin Infused Joint Box - The Menage #5 x One Piece - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on The Menage and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
